final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single large knowledge card illustration for children about the story of 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs) from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon / illustrated-storybook aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large card layout with a clear title at top, key story bullet points listed and labeled on the side, and the main area unfolding the story in cartoon illustration panels
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story from 三国, depicted in cartoon narrative form for children
Scene/backdrop: must include a 赤壁 river battle setting — fire ships, armies, and the dramatic river scene
Lighting/mood: needs a lively, engaging, child-friendly atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, vivid, child-friendly direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a cartoon illustration surface treatment — exact line weight and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" as the main title (large, prominent); must include key story bullet points labeled alongside the illustration (content: 曹操南下 / 孙刘联盟 / 草船借箭 / 火烧赤壁 / 曹军大败)
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; bullet points must be visually listed and marked beside the main illustration; layout must be readable and accessible for children
Avoid:
